mnemonics.title: CFG Components
mnemonics.content: **T**iny **N**injas **P**lay **S**occer - Remember the four components of a CFG: **T**erminals, **N**on-terminals, **P**roduction rules, **S**tart symbol.

mnemonics.title: Levels of Analysis
mnemonics.content: **M**y **S**illy **P**et - For the hierarchy of linguistic analysis: **M**orphology (word), **S**yntax (sentence), **P**ragmatics (context).
